Appearances: Raymond Chan appearing by Zoom for Herb Chan/Gregory Chan.

The Court stated that it would waive the incomplete notice and then granted the Amended First and Final Account and Report of Deceased Administrator Herb Chan by Successor Administator and Executor (the order was not signed in open court).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Matter not reported.
